prompt: Fix the bug where the blueprint image drifts relative to walls during zoom. Show corrected zoomAtPoint, corrected blueprint rendering, and explain root cause.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies root cause: blueprint drawn in screen/pixel space rather than inside the same ctx.setTransform() world-space context as walls
Corrected zoomAtPoint function shown with cursor-pivot math (panOffset adjusted so cursor world point stays fixed)
Blueprint rendered AFTER ctx.setTransform() is applied so it moves with the world coordinate system
ctx.save() and ctx.restore() wrap the blueprint draw call; ctx.globalAlpha set and then reset
Explanation clearly describes that drawing in screen space vs. world space is the mismatch causing drift
